verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ حمٓ
verses.text: Ḥā Mīm.

verses.quran_arabic: تَنزِيلُ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.text: The sending down of the Book is from God, the Mighty, the Wise.

verses.quran_arabic: مَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّۭى ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ عَمَّآ أُنذِرُوا۟ مُعْرِضُونَ
verses.text: We did not create the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, except in truth and (for) an appointed time, but those who disbelieve are turning away from what they are warned of.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَرُونِى مَاذَا خَلَقُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ لَهُمْ شِرْكٌۭ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ ۖ ٱئْتُونِى بِكِتَٰبٍۢ مِّن قَبْلِ هَٰذَآ أَوْ أَثَٰرَةٍۢ مِّنْ عِلْمٍ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Say: ‘Do you see what you call on instead of God? Show me what (part) of the earth they have created. Or do they have any partnership in (the creation of) the heavens? Bring me any Book before this (one) or any trace of knowledge, if you are truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَنْ أَضَلُّ مِمَّن يَدْعُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَن لَّا يَسْتَجِيبُ لَهُۥٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ وَهُمْ عَن دُعَآئِهِمْ غَٰفِلُونَ
verses.text: Who is farther astray than the one who, instead of God, calls on those who will not respond to him until the Day of Resurrection, while they are (otherwise) oblivious of their calling?

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا حُشِرَ ٱلنَّاسُ كَانُوا۟ لَهُمْ أَعْدَآءًۭ وَكَانُوا۟ بِعِبَادَتِهِمْ كَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: When the people are gathered, they will be enemies to them, and will deny their service.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَٰتُنَا بَيِّنَٰتٍۢ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ هَٰذَا سِحْرٌۭ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: When Our signs are recited to them as clear signs, those who disbelieve say to the truth, when it has come to them, ‘This is clear magic.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ ۖ قُلْ إِنِ ٱفْتَرَيْتُهُۥ فَلَا تَمْلِكُونَ لِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا ۖ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تُفِيضُونَ فِيهِ ۖ كَفَىٰ بِهِۦ شَهِيدًۢا بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَكُمْ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: Or do they say, ‘He has forged it’? Say: ‘If I have forged it, you (would) have no power at all to (help) me against God. He knows what you are busy with. He is sufficient as a witness between me and you. He is the Forgiving, the Compassionate.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ مَا كُنتُ بِدْعًۭا مِّنَ ٱلرُّسُلِ وَمَآ أَدْرِى مَا يُفْعَلُ بِى وَلَا بِكُمْ ۖ إِنْ أَتَّبِعُ إِلَّا مَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: Say: ‘I am not the first of the messengers, and I do not know what will be done with me or with you. I only follow what I am inspired (with). I am only a clear warner.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِن كَانَ مِنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ وَكَفَرْتُم بِهِۦ وَشَهِدَ شَاهِدٌۭ مِّنۢ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ عَلَىٰ مِثْلِهِۦ فَـَٔامَنَ وَٱسْتَكْبَرْتُمْ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: Say: ‘Do you see? If it is from God, and you disbelieve in it, and a witness from the Sons of Israel has borne witness to (a Book) like it, and believed, and you become arrogant – surely God does not guide the people who are evildoers.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَوْ كَانَ خَيْرًۭا مَّا سَبَقُونَآ إِلَيْهِ ۚ وَإِذْ لَمْ يَهْتَدُوا۟ بِهِۦ فَسَيَقُولُونَ هَٰذَآ إِفْكٌۭ قَدِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Those who disbelieve say to those who believe, ‘If it had been something good, they would not have gotten to it before us’ – even when they are not guided by it. And they say, ‘This is an old lie!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَمِن قَبْلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِمَامًۭا وَرَحْمَةًۭ ۚ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبٌۭ مُّصَدِّقٌۭ لِّسَانًا عَرَبِيًّۭا لِّيُنذِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Yet before it was the Book of Moses as a model and mercy; and this is a Book confirming (it) in the Arabic language, to warn those who do evil, and as good news for the doers of good.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن قَبۡلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰ إِمَامٗا وَرَحۡمَةٗۚ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبٞ مُّصَدِّقٞ لِّسَانًا عَرَبِيّٗا لِّتُنذِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَبُشۡرَىٰ لِلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that you may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن قَبۡلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰ إِمَامٗا وَرَحۡمَةٗۚ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبٞ مُّصَدِّقٞ لِّسَانًا عَرَبِيّٗا لِّيُنذِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَبُشۡرَىٰ لِلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that it may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن قَبْلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰ إِمَاماٗ وَرَحْمَةٗۖ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبٞ مُّصَدِّقٞ لِّسَاناً عَرَبِيّاٗ لِّتُنذِرَ اَ۬لذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُحْسِنِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that you may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِن قَبْلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوس۪ىٰٓ إِمَاماٗ وَرَحْمَةٗۖ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبٞ مُّصَدِّقٞ لِّسَاناً عَرَبِيّاٗ لِّتُنذِرَ اَ۬لذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَبُشْر۪ىٰ لِلْمُحْسِنِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that you may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ قَالُوا۟ رَبُّنَا ٱللَّهُ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَقَٰمُوا۟ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
verses.text: Surely those who say, ‘Our Lord is God,’ (and) then go straight – (there will be) no fear on them, nor will they sorrow.

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا جَزَآءًۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Those are the companions of the Garden, there to remain – a payment for what they have done.

verses.quran_arabic: وَوَصَّيْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ بِوَٰلِدَيْهِ إِحْسَٰنًا ۖ حَمَلَتْهُ أُمُّهُۥ كُرْهًۭا وَوَضَعَتْهُ كُرْهًۭا ۖ وَحَمْلُهُۥ وَفِصَٰلُهُۥ ثَلَٰثُونَ شَهْرًا ۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ وَبَلَغَ أَرْبَعِينَ سَنَةًۭ قَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَٰلِحًۭا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَصْلِحْ لِى فِى ذُرِّيَّتِىٓ ۖ إِنِّى تُبْتُ إِلَيْكَ وَإِنِّى مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: We have charged each person (to do) good to his parents – his mother bore him with difficulty, and she delivered him with difficulty – his bearing and his weaning are thirty months – until, when he reaches his maturity, and reaches forty years, he says, ‘My Lord, (so) dispose me that I may be thankful for your blessing with which You have blessed me and my parents, and that I may do righteousness pleasing to You, and do right by me concerning my descendants. Surely I turn to You (in repentance), and surely I am one of those who submit.’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَوَصَّيۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ بِوَٰلِدَيۡهِۦ حُسۡنًاۖ حَمَلَتۡهُۥ أُمُّهُۥ كَرۡهٗا وَوَضَعَتۡهُۥ كَرۡهٗاۖ وَحَمۡلُهُۥ وَفِصَٰلُهُۥ ثَلَٰثُونَ شَهۡرًاۚ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ وَبَلَغَ أَرۡبَعِينَ سَنَةٗ قَالَ رَبِّ أَوۡزِعۡنِيَ أَنۡ أَشۡكُرَ نِعۡمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِي أَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَيَّ وَأَنۡ أَعۡمَلَ صَٰلِحٗا تَرۡضَىٰهُۥ وَأَصۡلِحۡ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِيۖ إِنِّي تُبۡتُ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِنِّي مِنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And We have enjoined upon man kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَوَصَّيۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ بِوَٰلِدَيۡهِۦ حُسۡنًاۖ حَمَلَتۡهُۥ أُمُّهُۥ كَرۡهٗا وَوَضَعَتۡهُۥ كَرۡهٗاۖ وَحَمۡلُهُۥ وَفِصَٰلُهُۥ ثَلَٰثُونَ شَهۡرًاۚ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ وَبَلَغَ أَرۡبَعِينَ سَنَةٗ قَالَ رَبِّ أَوۡزِعۡنِي أَنۡ أَشۡكُرَ نِعۡمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِي أَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَيَّ وَأَنۡ أَعۡمَلَ صَٰلِحٗا تَرۡضَىٰهُۥ وَأَصۡلِحۡ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِيۖ إِنِّي تُبۡتُ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِنِّي مِنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And We have enjoined upon man kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ نَتَقَبَّلُ عَنْهُمْ أَحْسَنَ مَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَنَتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ فِىٓ أَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ۖ وَعْدَ ٱلصِّدْقِ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: Those are the ones from whom We shall accept the best of what they have done, and We shall pass over their evil deeds. (They will be) among the companions of the Garden – the promise of truth which they were promised.

canonical_variants.arabic: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ فِيٓ أَصۡحَٰبِ اِ۬لۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ اَ۬لصِّدۡقِ اِ۬لَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.

canonical_variants.arabic: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ  عَنۡهُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ فِي أَصۡحَٰبِ  اِ۬لۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ اَ۬لصِّدۡقِ اِ۬لَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.

canonical_variants.arabic: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ فِيٓ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ ٱلصِّدۡقِ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.

canonical_variants.arabic: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ نَتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمۡ أَحۡسَنَ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَنَتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ فِيٓ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ ٱلصِّدۡقِ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Those are the ones from whom We accept the best of what they have done and whose misdeeds We overlook ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.

canonical_variants.arabic: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمُۥ أَحۡسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمُۥ فِي أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ ٱلصِّدۡقِ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.

canonical_variants.arabic: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمُۥ أَحۡسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمُۥ فِي أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ ٱلصِّدۡقِ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.

canonical_variants.arabic: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ اَ۬لذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنْهُمْ أَحْسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ فِے أَصْحَٰبِ اِ۬لْجَنَّةِۖ وَعْدَ اَ۬لصِّدْقِ اِ۬لذِے كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.

canonical_variants.arabic: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ اَ۬لذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنْهُمُۥٓ أَحْسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ فِےٓ أَصْحَٰبِ اِ۬لْجَنَّةِۖ وَعْدَ اَ۬لصِّدْقِ اِ۬لذِے كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِى قَالَ لِوَٰلِدَيْهِ أُفٍّۢ لَّكُمَآ أَتَعِدَانِنِىٓ أَنْ أُخْرَجَ وَقَدْ خَلَتِ ٱلْقُرُونُ مِن قَبْلِى وَهُمَا يَسْتَغِيثَانِ ٱللَّهَ وَيْلَكَ ءَامِنْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّۭ فَيَقُولُ مَا هَٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: But the one who says to his parents, ‘Uff to both of you! Do you promise me that I shall be brought forth, when generations have already passed away before me?,’ while both of them call on God for help: ‘Woe to you! Believe! Surely the promise of God is true!,’ and he says, ‘This is nothing but old tales’ –

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ حَقَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقَوْلُ فِىٓ أُمَمٍۢ قَدْ خَلَتْ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ خَٰسِرِينَ
verses.text: those are the ones against whom the word has proved true about the communities of jinn and humankind (which) have already passed away before them. Surely they were losers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلِكُلٍّۢ دَرَجَٰتٌۭ مِّمَّا عَمِلُوا۟ ۖ وَلِيُوَفِّيَهُمْ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
verses.text: For each (there are) ranks, according to what they have done, and so that He may pay them in full for their deeds – and they will not be done evil.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلِكُلّٖ دَرَجَٰتٞ مِّمَّا عَمِلُواْۖ وَلِنُوَفِّيَهُمْ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And for all, there are degrees according to what they have done, and that We may render to them in full (the reward) for their deeds, and they will not be dealt with unjustly.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلِكُلّٖ دَرَجَٰتٞ مِّمَّا عَمِلُواْۖ وَلِنُوَفِّيَهُمُۥٓ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And for all, there are degrees according to what they have done, and that We may render to them in full (the reward) for their deeds, and they will not be dealt with unjustly.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَوْمَ يُعْرَضُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ أَذْهَبْتُمْ طَيِّبَٰتِكُمْ فِى حَيَاتِكُمُ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱسْتَمْتَعْتُم بِهَا فَٱلْيَوْمَ تُجْزَوْنَ عَذَابَ ٱلْهُونِ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَسْتَكْبِرُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنتُمْ تَفْسُقُونَ
verses.text: On the Day when those who disbelieve are presented to the Fire: ‘You squandered your good things in your present life, and enjoyed them. So today you will be paid the punishment of humiliation because you became arrogant on the earth without any right, and because you have acted wickedly.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَٱذْكُرْ أَخَا عَادٍ إِذْ أَنذَرَ قَوْمَهُۥ بِٱلْأَحْقَافِ وَقَدْ خَلَتِ ٱلنُّذُرُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِۦٓ أَلَّا تَعْبُدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Remember the brother of ‘Ād: When he warned his people at the sand dunes – and warners had already passed away before him and after him – (saying): ‘Do not serve (anyone) but God! Surely I fear for you the punishment of a great Day.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتَأْفِكَنَا عَنْ ءَالِهَتِنَا فَأْتِنَا بِمَا تَعِدُنَآ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Have you come to defraud us of our gods? Bring us what you promise us, if you are one of the truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَا ٱلْعِلْمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَأُبَلِّغُكُم مَّآ أُرْسِلْتُ بِهِۦ وَلَٰكِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰكُمْ قَوْمًۭا تَجْهَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘The knowledge (of it) is only with God. I deliver to you what I was sent with, but I see you are an ignorant people.’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَا اَ۬لۡعِلۡمُ عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ وَأُبۡلِغُكُم مَّآ أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ وَلَٰكِنِّيَ أَر۪ىٰكُمۡ قَوۡمٗا تَجۡهَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “Indeed, all knowledge is only with Allah, and I compile and proclaim to you what I have been sent with, but I see you are an ignorant people.”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَا اَ۬لۡعِلۡمُ عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ  وَأُبۡلِغُكُم مَّا أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ وَلَٰكِنِّيَ أَر۪ىٰكُمۡ قَوۡمٗا تَجۡهَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “Indeed, all knowledge is only with Allah, and I compile and proclaim to you what I have been sent with, but I see you are an ignorant people.”

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهُ عَارِضًۭا مُّسْتَقْبِلَ أَوْدِيَتِهِمْ قَالُوا۟ هَٰذَا عَارِضٌۭ مُّمْطِرُنَا ۚ بَلْ هُوَ مَا ٱسْتَعْجَلْتُم بِهِۦ ۖ رِيحٌۭ فِيهَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: When they saw it as a cloud approaching their wādīs, they said, ‘This is a cloud (which) is going to give us rain.’ ‘No! It is what you were seeking to hurry – a wind in which (there is) a painful punishment,

verses.quran_arabic: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَىْءٍۭ بِأَمْرِ رَبِّهَا فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ لَا يُرَىٰٓ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنُهُمْ ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: destroying everything by the command of its Lord.’ And morning found them not to be seen, except for their dwelling places. In this way We repay the people who are sinners.

canonical_variants.arabic: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَيۡءِۢ بِأَمۡرِ رَبِّهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ لَا تَر۪يٰٓ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمۡۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي اِ۬لۡقَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
canonical_variants.english: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.

canonical_variants.arabic: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ  شَيۡءِۢ بِأَمۡر رَّبِّهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ لَا تَر۪يٰ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمۡۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي  اِ۬لۡقَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
canonical_variants.english: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.

canonical_variants.arabic: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَيۡءِۭ بِأَمۡرِ رَبِّهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ لَا تَرَىٰ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمُۥۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
canonical_variants.english: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.

canonical_variants.arabic: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَيۡءِۭ بِأَمۡرِ رَبِّهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ لَا تَرَىٰ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمُۥۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡقَوۡمَ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
canonical_variants.english: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.

canonical_variants.arabic: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَےْءِۢ بِأَمْرِ رَبِّهَاۖ فَأَصْبَحُواْ لَا تَرَىٰ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمْۖ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِے اِ۬لْقَوْمَ اَ۬لْمُجْرِمِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.

canonical_variants.arabic: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَےْءِۢ بِأَمْرِ رَبِّهَاۖ فَأَصْبَحُواْ لَا تَر۪ىٰٓ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمْۖ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِے اِ۬لْقَوْمَ اَ۬لْمُجْرِمِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ مَكَّنَّٰهُمْ فِيمَآ إِن مَّكَّنَّٰكُمْ فِيهِ وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ سَمْعًۭا وَأَبْصَٰرًۭا وَأَفْـِٔدَةًۭ فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُمْ سَمْعُهُمْ وَلَآ أَبْصَٰرُهُمْ وَلَآ أَفْـِٔدَتُهُم مِّن شَىْءٍ إِذْ كَانُوا۟ يَجْحَدُونَ بِـَٔايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We had established them with what We have not established you, and We gave them hearing and sight and hearts. Yet their hearing and their sight and their hearts were of no use to them at all, since they denied the signs of God, and what they were mocking overwhelmed them.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَا مَا حَوْلَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرَىٰ وَصَرَّفْنَا ٱلْءَايَٰتِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We destroyed the towns around you, and varied the signs so that they might return.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَوْلَا نَصَرَهُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ قُرْبَانًا ءَالِهَةًۢ ۖ بَلْ ضَلُّوا۟ عَنْهُمْ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ إِفْكُهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْتَرُونَ
verses.text: Why did they not help them – those gods whom they had taken, instead of God, as a (means of) drawing near (to Him)? No! They abandoned them. That was their lie and what they had forged.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ صَرَفْنَآ إِلَيْكَ نَفَرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ يَسْتَمِعُونَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ فَلَمَّا حَضَرُوهُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنصِتُوا۟ ۖ فَلَمَّا قُضِىَ وَلَّوْا۟ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِم مُّنذِرِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when We turned a band of jinn to you to listen to the Qur’ān: When they were in its presence, they said, ‘Be silent!’ And when it was finished, they turned back to their people as warners.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰقَوْمَنَآ إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا كِتَٰبًا أُنزِلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مُوسَىٰ مُصَدِّقًۭا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلْحَقِّ وَإِلَىٰ طَرِيقٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ
verses.text: They said, ‘Our people! Surely We have heard a Book (which) has been sent down after Moses, confirming what was before it, guiding to the truth and to a straight road.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰقَوْمَنَآ أَجِيبُوا۟ دَاعِىَ ٱللَّهِ وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُجِرْكُم مِّنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Our people! Respond to the caller of God, and believe in Him. He will forgive you some of your sins, and protect you from a painful punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن لَّا يُجِبْ دَاعِىَ ٱللَّهِ فَلَيْسَ بِمُعْجِزٍۢ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَيْسَ لَهُۥ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءُ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Whoever does not respond to the caller of God – there is no escaping (Him) on the earth, and he has no allies other than Him. Those are clearly astray.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَلَمْ يَعْىَ بِخَلْقِهِنَّ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْۦِىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ ۚ بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ
verses.text: Do they not see that God, who created the heavens and earth, and was not tired out by their creation, is able to give the dead life? Yes indeed! Surely He is powerful over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَوْمَ يُعْرَضُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ أَلَيْسَ هَٰذَا بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ وَرَبِّنَا ۚ قَالَ فَذُوقُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
verses.text: On the Day when those who disbelieve are presented to the Fire: ‘Is this not the truth?’ They will say, ‘Yes indeed! By our Lord!’ He will say, ‘Taste the punishment for what you have disbelieved.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ كَمَا صَبَرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْعَزْمِ مِنَ ٱلرُّسُلِ وَلَا تَسْتَعْجِل لَّهُمْ ۚ كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَ مَا يُوعَدُونَ لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ إِلَّا سَاعَةًۭ مِّن نَّهَارٍۭ ۚ بَلَٰغٌۭ ۚ فَهَلْ يُهْلَكُ إِلَّا ٱلْقَوْمُ ٱلْفَٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Be patient, as the messengers of firm resolve were (also) patient. Do not seek to hurry it for them. On the Day when they see what they are promised, (it will seem) as if they had remained (in the grave) for only an hour of the day. A delivery! Will any be destroyed but the people who are wicked?
